description: Organize wine tasting notes into a structured spreadsheet at /home/ga/Documents/wine_tasting_analysis.xlsx. Include ratings and prices, calculate averages using formulas, and implement conditional logic for recommendations. Apply conditional formatting to highlight best value wines.

natural_language.prompt: You attended a wine tasting event and took notes on 6 different wines. Now you need to organize this information into a spreadsheet to help you decide which wines to purchase. Enter the wine details (name, varietal, rating, price, flavor notes), calculate average rating and price, create a recommendation formula that flags wines with rating ≥ 4.0 AND price ≤ $25, and apply conditional formatting to visually highlight the recommended wines.
